narration: XOR makes equal pairs cancel out.
callout: The two 1s cancel and the two 2s cancel.

narration: After all the canceling, the only number left is the one without a pair.
decision: That is why the running XOR answer becomes the single number.

choices.feedback: Correct. Equal values cancel under XOR.

choices.label: x
choices.feedback: Not this one. XOR with the same value becomes 0.

narration: The trick works because XOR keeps canceling matches while leaving the unpaired value untouched.
callout: This is the signature Single Number bit trick.
